semantic.role: CLI presentation module that renders colored ASCII art banners for the ArchSpine command-line interface.
responsibilities: Reads the package version from package.json and caches it for reuse.
Renders a large, colorized ASCII art banner with version information during full startup of the CLI.
Renders a compact one-line banner for quick or sub-command invocations.
outOfScope: Business logic or core pipeline operations.
invariants: Brand colors are hardcoded as hex #ec9877 (orange) and #ebefbb (cream).
Version is read once from disk and cached indefinitely.
Banners are printed synchronously via console.log.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a lightweight, visually consistent branding layer for all CLI interactions.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial implementation of full and mini banner rendering as part of ArchSpine v1.0.0 launch.

publicSurface.description: Prints a large ASCII art banner with the ArchSpine logo and version. Called once at the start of interactive or verbose CLI sessions.
Prints a compact one-line colored banner showing 'ArchSpine' in brand colors. Used for quick command invocations where a full banner is excessive.
